Outcome.CritSuccessText: You achieve your goal cleanly and gain a strong edge.
Outcome.StrongSuccessText: Your intent succeeds clearly without a notable cost.
Outcome.MixedText: Your intent succeeds, but a hook or complication appears.
Outcome.FailureText: Your intent fails and the scene turns against you.
Outcome.CritFailureText: Your intent fails hard and the situation worsens significantly.

Help.EPSpentRecalc: Recalculates XP spent from attributes, facets, skills, and maneuver costs.
Help.FocusAttributes: Pick up to two primary attributes. Selecting a third one resets that change.
Help.FacetDelta: Deviation from the primary attribute baseline. Each step changes the facet total accordingly.
Help.TempTab: Temporary tab for fields moved out during iteration.

Notification.FocusMaxTwo: A maximum of two primary attributes is allowed.

Attr.KoerperHelp: Body – Physique, endurance, movement, close-range assertion
Attr.GeistHelp: Mind – Analysis, knowledge, tech, planning, controlled processing
Attr.PraesenzHelp: Presence – Impact, expression, influence, social and metaphysical assertion

Facet.StaerkeHelp: Strength – raw force, prying, carrying, impact
Facet.GrobmotorikHelp: Gross Motor – large movement coordination, sprint, jump, melee flow
Facet.FeinmotorikHelp: Fine Motor – precision, finger work, steady hand, delicate tool use
Facet.KonstitutionHelp: Constitution – resilience, fatigue resistance, pain and toxin tolerance
Facet.AnalyseHelp: Analysis – pattern recognition, logic, tactical assessment, inference
Facet.WillenskraftHelp: Willpower – mental steadfastness, self-control, stress resistance, inner counter-pressure
Facet.AufmerksamkeitHelp: Attention – perception, sustaining focus, stimulus filtering, situational reading
Facet.IntuitionHelp: Intuition – quick judgements, gut decisions, situational feel, sensory integration
Facet.AusdruckHelp: Expression – projecting intent and effect outward, clear communication, presence
Facet.EmpathieHelp: Empathy – reading moods and motives, social fine-tuning, resonant understanding
Facet.DominanzHelp: Dominance – projecting power, setting limits, asserting own will against resistance
Facet.ResonanzHelp: Resonance – aura, metaphysical radiance, contact with spirits and supernatural fields
